name: hpm-intranet
description: HPM Intranet — root-level deploy orchestration for the frontend + Cloud Functions across environments.

scripts.build:staging: cd frontend && npm run build -- --mode staging
scripts.build:production: cd frontend && npm run build -- --mode production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:functions && npm run build:staging && firebase deploy --project staging
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:functions && npm run build:production && firebase deploy --project production
